scenes.npcDialog: Good morning! May I see your passport and booking confirmation?
Do you have a seat preference? Window or aisle?
scenes.npcDialogKo: 좌석 선호가 있으신가요? 창가 아니면 통로?

choices.text: I want to sit on the wing.

scenes.npcDialog: How many bags are you checking in today?

choices.text: I want to check in myself.

scenes.npcDialog: Please place your laptop and liquids in a separate tray.
Please step aside. Do you have anything metal in your pockets?

choices.text: Oh, I forgot my belt. Let me remove it.
I might have some coins. Here they are.

scenes.npcDialog: Can I help you find something?

choices.text: I'm looking for my gate. It's gate 25.

scenes.npcDialog: Would you like to see anything in particular?
We're now boarding rows 20 to 35. May I see your boarding pass?
Can I help you find your seat?
Let me help you with your bag. Is this your carry-on?
scenes.npcDialogKo: 가방 넣는 것 도와드릴게요. 이게 기내용 가방인가요?

scenes.npcDialog: What would you like to drink? We have juice, water, coffee, and tea.
scenes.npcDialogKo: 음료는 뭘로 드릴까요? 주스, 물, 커피, 차가 있습니다.

scenes.npcDialog: For your meal, would you like beef or chicken?
scenes.npcDialogKo: 식사로 소고기와 닭고기 중 뭘로 드릴까요?

scenes.npcDialog: Is there anything else I can get for you?

choices.text: Could I get a blanket, please?
I want to sleep in first class.

scenes.npcDialog: Excuse me, the seatbelt sign is on. Could you wait a moment?
scenes.npcDialogKo: 죄송합니다, 안전벨트 사인이 켜져있어요. 잠시 기다려주시겠어요?

choices.text: Okay, I'll go back to my seat.
I don't care about the sign.

scenes.npcDialog: Do you need help filling out the arrival card?

choices.text: Yes, what should I write for 'purpose of visit'?
Where do I write my hotel address?

scenes.npcDialog: Would you like headphones for the entertainment system?

choices.text: That would be great, thank you.

scenes.npcDialog: Please return to your seat and fasten your seatbelt. We're experiencing turbulence.
scenes.npcDialogKo: 좌석으로 돌아가 안전벨트를 매주세요. 난기류가 있습니다.

choices.text: Okay, I'll sit down right away.
Is it going to be a rough ride?

scenes.npcDialog: We'll be landing in 30 minutes. Please put your tray table up and seat in the upright position.
scenes.npcDialogKo: 30분 후 착륙합니다. 테이블을 접고 좌석을 바로 세워주세요.

choices.text: Okay, thank you for letting me know.

scenes.situation: 터키의 거대한 신공항에 도착했다. 현대적이고 웅장한 건축물에 감탄한다.
scenes.npcDialog: Hoş geldiniz! Welcome to Istanbul Airport. Very new, very big! Transfer to Amsterdam? Take escalator to Level 2, follow blue signs.
scenes.npcDialogKo: 호쉬 겔디니즈! 이스탄불 공항에 오신 것을 환영합니다. 아주 새롭고 커요! 암스테르담 환승이요? 에스컬레이터로 2층 가서 파란 표지판 따라가세요.

choices.text: Teşekkürler! This airport is amazing! Is there a lounge I can use?
choices.feedback: 터키어로 감사를 표현하고 라운지를 물어보는 것이 좋습니다.

choices.text: Thank you! I have 5 hours. Any recommendations?
choices.feedback: 5시간 동안 할 수 있는 것을 물어보는 현명한 질문입니다.

choices.text: This airport is too big to walk around.
I just want to sit and wait.

scenes.situation: 터키항공 라운지를 발견했다. 입장 가능 여부를 확인한다.
scenes.npcDialog: Welcome! Do you have business class ticket or lounge access card? We also offer day passes for 50 dollars.
scenes.npcDialogKo: 환영합니다! 비즈니스석 티켓이나 라운지 카드 있으세요? 50달러에 당일 이용권도 판매해요.

choices.text: I'm economy, but I'd like to buy a day pass. What's included?
choices.feedback: 라운지 이용을 위해 비용을 지불할 의향을 표현합니다.

choices.text: I don't have access. Are there comfortable seats elsewhere?
50 dollars is too expensive for a few hours.
choices.feedback: 좀 더 부드럽게 거절할 수 있습니다.

choices.text: Let me in anyway, I'm tired.

scenes.situation: 터키 음식이 먹고 싶어 레스토랑에 들어갔다. 케밥과 터키 피자의 향기가 진동한다.
scenes.npcDialog: Merhaba! Try our famous Turkish kebab or pide - Turkish pizza! Fresh from the oven. Ayran to drink? Traditional yogurt drink, very refreshing!
scenes.npcDialogKo: 메르하바! 유명한 터키 케밥이나 피데 - 터키 피자 드셔보세요! 오븐에서 갓 나왔어요. 음료는 아이란? 전통 요구르트 음료, 아주 상쾌해요!

choices.text: I'll have the kebab with ayran! I've always wanted to try authentic Turkish food.
choices.feedback: 진정한 터키 음식을 시도하는 훌륭한 선택입니다.

choices.text: What's in the pide? Is it like Italian pizza?
Do you have any non-Turkish food?
choices.feedback: 터키에서 터키 음식을 거부하는 것은 아쉬운 선택입니다.

scenes.situation: 터키 커피를 주문했다. 바리스타가 커피 점을 봐준다고 제안한다.
scenes.npcDialog: Turkish coffee ready! When you finish, turn cup upside down. I read your fortune from the coffee grounds - old Turkish tradition!
scenes.npcDialogKo: 터키 커피 나왔어요! 다 마시면 컵을 뒤집어 놓으세요. 커피 찌꺼기로 점을 봐드릴게요 - 오래된 터키 전통이에요!

choices.text: That's so interesting! I'd love to try that. How does it work?
choices.feedback: 터키 문화를 체험하려는 열린 마음이 좋습니다.

choices.text: Really? I've heard about Turkish coffee fortune telling! Let's do it!

choices.feedback: 문화적 전통을 무시하는 것은 적절하지 않습니다.

choices.text: I just want the coffee, nothing else.
choices.feedback: 좀 더 부드럽게 거절할 수 있습니다.

scenes.location: 이스탄불 공항 그랜드 바자르 스타일 면세점
scenes.situation: 그랜드 바자르를 재현한 면세점 구역. 터키 램프, 카펫, 도자기가 화려하다.
scenes.npcDialog: Look at these handmade Turkish lamps! When light shines, very beautiful! Also authentic Turkish evil eye - nazar boncuğu - for protection. Good luck charm!
scenes.npcDialogKo: 이 수공예 터키 램프 보세요! 불빛 켜면 아주 예뻐요! 진짜 터키 악마의 눈 - 나자르 본주 - 보호해줘요. 행운의 부적이에요!

choices.text: The lamps are gorgeous! Can I take one on the plane as carry-on?
choices.feedback: 휴대 가능 여부를 확인하는 현명한 질문입니다.

choices.text: I'd like a small evil eye charm. What's the story behind it?

scenes.situation: 터키쉬 딜라이트(로쿰) 가게에서 시식을 권한다. 다양한 맛이 있다.
scenes.npcDialog: Free sample! Try our lokum - Turkish delight. Rose, pistachio, pomegranate, many flavors! Made in Istanbul for 500 years. Perfect gift!
scenes.npcDialogKo: 무료 시식하세요! 로쿰 - 터키쉬 딜라이트예요. 장미, 피스타치오, 석류, 맛이 다양해요! 500년간 이스탄불에서 만들어왔어요. 완벽한 선물!

choices.text: Mmm, delicious! I'll take a mixed box. Which flavors are most popular?
choices.feedback: 인기 있는 맛을 물어보는 것이 좋습니다.

choices.text: Can I try the rose flavor? Is it very sweet?
Too sweet for me, no thanks.
choices.feedback: 시식도 안 하고 거절하는 것은 아쉽습니다.

scenes.situation: 공항에서 보스포루스 해협이 보인다는 안내를 발견했다.
scenes.npcDialog: From observation deck, you can see where Europe meets Asia! Bosphorus strait is right there. Beautiful sunset view!
scenes.npcDialogKo: 전망대에서 유럽과 아시아가 만나는 곳을 볼 수 있어요! 보스포루스 해협이 바로 저기예요. 일몰이 아름다워요!

choices.text: Wow, I'm standing between two continents! This is incredible!
choices.feedback: 두 대륙 사이에 있다는 특별한 경험을 표현합니다.

choices.text: What a view! I wish I had more time to explore Istanbul.

scenes.situation: 암스테르담행 비행기 탑승 시간이다. 터키에서의 짧은 시간이 인상적이었다.
scenes.npcDialog: Boarding now for Amsterdam. Thank you for visiting Turkey. Güle güle - goodbye! Hope to see you again for a longer visit!
scenes.npcDialogKo: 암스테르담행 탑승 시작합니다. 터키를 방문해주셔서 감사합니다. 귤레 귤레 - 안녕히 가세요! 다음엔 더 오래 계시길 바라요!

choices.text: Teşekkürler! I definitely want to come back and see more of Turkey!
choices.feedback: 터키에 다시 오고 싶다는 의사를 표현합니다.

choices.text: This was a wonderful layover. Istanbul Airport is amazing!

scenes.npcDialog: What is the purpose of your visit?
How long will you be staying?

choices.text: I'll be here for two weeks.

scenes.npcDialog: Where will you be staying?

choices.text: I'm staying at the Hilton Hotel.
At a hotel in the city center.

scenes.npcDialog: Do you have a return ticket?

choices.text: Yes, I'm flying back on the 15th.

scenes.npcDialog: Which carousel is your luggage on?

choices.text: I'm not sure. My flight was from Seoul.

scenes.npcDialog: Is there a problem with your luggage?

choices.text: Yes, my bag hasn't come out yet.
I can't find my suitcase. It's a black one.

scenes.npcDialog: How much would you like to exchange?

choices.text: Can I exchange 300 dollars to euros?

scenes.npcDialog: Today's rate is 1.08 euros per dollar. Is that okay?
How can I help you today?

choices.text: How do I get to the city center?
What's the best way to get downtown?

scenes.npcDialog: Where would you like to go?

choices.text: One ticket to Central Station, please.
How much is a ticket to the city center?

scenes.npcDialog: Good evening! Do you have a reservation?

choices.text: Yes, I have a reservation under Kim.
Yes, I booked online. Here's my confirmation.
No, but give me the best room.

scenes.npcDialog: Your room includes breakfast. It's served from 7 to 10 AM.

choices.text: Great, where is the breakfast room?
Perfect, thank you for the information.

scenes.npcDialog: Is there anything else you need?

choices.text: Could you tell me the WiFi password?

scenes.npcDialog: Bonjour! Would you like tickets to the top? Elevator or stairs? Stairs are cheaper but 674 steps!
scenes.npcDialogKo: 봉주르! 꼭대기 티켓 원하세요? 엘리베이터? 계단? 계단이 저렴한데 674계단이에요!

choices.text: I'll take the elevator! What's the view like from the top?
674 steps sounds like a challenge! I'll do the stairs.
That's too many steps and too expensive.

scenes.npcDialog: The Impressionist collection is on the 5th floor. Monet's Water Lilies, Van Gogh's Starry Night... Magnificent!
scenes.npcDialogKo: 인상파 컬렉션은 5층에 있어요. 모네의 수련, 반 고흐의 별이 빛나는 밤... 장관이에요!

choices.text: I can't wait to see the Water Lilies! Is photography allowed?
Which floor should I start from?

scenes.npcDialog: Versailles is 40 minutes by train. The Hall of Mirrors is spectacular! Book online to skip the line.
scenes.npcDialogKo: 베르사유는 기차로 40분이에요. 거울의 방이 장관이에요! 줄 안 서려면 온라인 예약하세요.

choices.text: I've always wanted to see the Hall of Mirrors! How much time should I plan?
Is the garden worth visiting too?

scenes.npcDialog: Welcome to the business center. How can I assist you?
scenes.npcDialogKo: 비즈니스센터에 오신 것을 환영합니다. 어떻게 도와드릴까요?

choices.text: I need to print some documents.
Is there a computer I can use?

scenes.npcDialog: Looking for a corporate gift?

choices.text: Yes, something elegant for our client.
What do you recommend for business partners?
Gifts are a waste of money.

scenes.npcDialog: Need any help with printing?

choices.text: I need to print a contract. Can you help format it?

scenes.npcDialog: Welcome! You have a private room with shared bathroom. Breakfast is included!
scenes.npcDialogKo: 환영합니다! 공용 화장실이 있는 개인실이에요. 조식 포함이에요!

choices.text: Great! What time is breakfast served?
Perfect, can I see the room first?

scenes.npcDialog: We have a half-day group tour for 35 euros. Interested?

choices.text: How big is the group usually?
That's too expensive for a group.
I want a private tour for that price.

scenes.npcDialog: Looking for the Mona Lisa? It's in the Denon Wing, but expect crowds! I recommend the audio guide.
scenes.npcDialogKo: 모나리자 찾으세요? 드농 윙에 있는데 사람이 많아요! 오디오 가이드 추천해요.

choices.text: Thanks! How long should I plan for the whole museum?
I'll get the audio guide. Is it available in Korean?
I've seen the Mona Lisa in pictures already.

scenes.npcDialog: Le Marais has the best vintage shops! This jacket is from the 70s. Very fashionable in Paris now.
scenes.npcDialogKo: 마레에 최고의 빈티지 숍이 있어요! 이 재킷은 70년대거예요. 지금 파리에서 아주 유행해요.

choices.text: It's so stylish! Can I try it on?
I love vintage fashion! What else do you recommend?
Old clothes are just used clothes.

scenes.npcDialog: The rooftop terrace is free! Amazing view of the Opera and Eiffel Tower. Would you like to see our perfume section?
scenes.npcDialogKo: 옥상 테라스는 무료예요! 오페라와 에펠탑 전망이 멋져요. 향수 구역 보시겠어요?

choices.text: A free rooftop view? I'll definitely check that out first!
Yes, I'd love to see the French perfumes!
Department stores are all the same.

scenes.npcDialog: Would you like to book a meeting room?

choices.text: Yes, for 6 people tomorrow at 2 PM.
What equipment is included in the room?

scenes.npcDialog: Would you like pressing service for your suit?

choices.text: Yes, please. I need it by 7 AM tomorrow.
How long does express pressing take?

scenes.npcDialog: Would you like to send something?

choices.text: Yes, I need to courier these documents urgently.
What's the fastest shipping option to Korea?

scenes.npcDialog: Good morning! Help yourself to the breakfast buffet.
scenes.npcDialogKo: 좋은 아침이에요! 조식 뷔페 마음껏 드세요.

choices.text: Thank you! Is there fresh juice?
Great, what time does breakfast end?

scenes.npcDialog: Are you eligible for any discounts?

choices.text: Yes, I'm a student. Here's my ID.
I should get in for free.

scenes.npcDialog: Bonjour! Un café au lait et un croissant? Our croissants are baked fresh every morning. Très délicieux!
scenes.npcDialogKo: 봉주르! 카페오레와 크루아상요? 크루아상은 매일 아침 갓 구워요. 아주 맛있어요!

choices.text: Yes please! This is the real Parisian breakfast experience!
And a pain au chocolat too, please! I love French pastries.
Why is everything so expensive in Paris?

scenes.npcDialog: You can climb 284 steps to the top of the Arc de Triomphe. The view of 12 avenues meeting here is unique!
scenes.npcDialogKo: 개선문 꼭대기까지 284계단 올라갈 수 있어요. 12개 거리가 만나는 전망이 독특해요!

choices.text: 284 steps - that's a good workout! Is it worth the climb?
What time does it close? I'd love to see the sunset.
I can see it from the street.

scenes.npcDialog: French wine tasting! Bordeaux, Burgundy, Champagne... I can recommend based on your taste. Sweet or dry?
scenes.npcDialogKo: 프랑스 와인 시음이에요! 보르도, 부르고뉴, 샴페인... 취향에 맞게 추천해드려요. 달콤한 것? 드라이한 것?

choices.text: I'd like to try Burgundy. What makes it special?
Champagne in Paris - that's a dream come true!
Wine all tastes the same to me.

scenes.npcDialog: The printer is right there. Need help?

choices.text: Can you help me make 10 copies?

scenes.npcDialog: That'll be 35 euros.

choices.text: Can I get a receipt, please? For my expense report.
I need a proper receipt with the company name.

scenes.npcDialog: Do you need laundry service?

choices.text: I need my shirt cleaned urgently. Is same-day possible?
I have a meeting in 4 hours. Can you clean this quickly?

scenes.npcDialog: Your ticket includes one checked bag. Would you like to check any luggage?
scenes.npcDialogKo: 티켓에 위탁 수하물 1개가 포함되어 있어요. 수하물 부치시겠어요?

choices.text: Yes, I have one bag to check.
Can I check three bags for free?

scenes.npcDialog: Airport shuttle to the city center? It's 15 euros per person.

choices.text: Sure, when is the next one leaving?
How long does it take to the center?
That's too expensive for a shared ride.

scenes.npcDialog: Welcome to Louis Vuitton on the Champs-Élysées! Would you like to see our Paris exclusive items?
scenes.npcDialogKo: 샹젤리제 루이비통에 오신 것을 환영해요! 파리 한정 상품 보시겠어요?

choices.text: Yes! What's special about the Paris exclusives?
I'm just browsing. This store is beautiful!

scenes.npcDialog: Ladurée macarons! We have rose, pistachio, caramel, lavender... Would you like a box?
scenes.npcDialogKo: 라뒤레 마카롱이에요! 장미, 피스타치오, 카라멜, 라벤더... 박스로 드릴까요?

choices.text: They're like little works of art! I'll take an assorted box.
Which flavor is the most popular? I want to try the best one!
Macarons are too sweet and overpriced.

scenes.npcDialog: The Palais Garnier inspired Phantom of the Opera! The ceiling by Chagall is breathtaking. Tour available now.
scenes.npcDialogKo: 팔레 가르니에가 오페라의 유령에 영감을 줬어요! 샤갈의 천장화가 숨막혀요. 투어 가능해요.

choices.text: I love Phantom of the Opera! Can I see the famous chandelier?
Chagall painted the ceiling? I had no idea! Let's do the tour.

scenes.npcDialog: Will you need any interpretation services?

choices.text: Yes, do you have a Korean interpreter?

scenes.npcDialog: How would you like to pay?

choices.text: I'll pay with my corporate credit card.
Send the bill to my boss.

scenes.npcDialog: How can I help you with your booking?

choices.text: I need to change my flight to tomorrow. Is that possible?
My meeting got extended. Can I fly out a day later?

scenes.npcDialog: This is a local favorite. Would you like to try our special?
scenes.npcDialogKo: 현지인들이 좋아하는 곳이에요. 저희 스페셜 드셔보실래요?

choices.text: Yes, I'd love to try the local specialty!

scenes.npcDialog: This is handmade by local artisans. 25 euros.

choices.text: It's beautiful! Can I see more designs?
Does it come with any certificate of authenticity?
I can buy this cheaper online.

scenes.situation: 복원 중인 노트르담 대성당 주변을 방문한다
scenes.npcDialog: Notre-Dame is still being restored after the fire. You can see the progress from the plaza. It's still very moving.
scenes.npcDialogKo: 노트르담은 화재 후 아직 복원 중이에요. 광장에서 진행 상황을 볼 수 있어요. 여전히 감동적이에요.

choices.text: I heard about the fire. It's good to see the restoration progress.
Even from outside, it's magnificent. When will it reopen?
It's disappointing we can't go inside.

scenes.npcDialog: Would you like a portrait? I can do caricature or realistic style. 15 minutes only!
scenes.npcDialogKo: 초상화 그려드릴까요? 캐리커처나 사실적 스타일 가능해요. 15분이면 돼요!

choices.text: A caricature sounds fun! How much is it?
I'd love a realistic portrait as a Paris souvenir!
Street artists are all the same.
I don't like having my picture drawn.

scenes.npcDialog: Escargot - French snails with garlic butter! A true Parisian delicacy. Brave enough to try?
scenes.npcDialogKo: 에스카르고 - 마늘 버터 달팽이요! 진정한 파리 별미예요. 시도해볼 용기 있으세요?

choices.text: When in Paris! I'll try six. How do I eat them properly?
I've always wanted to try escargot! Is it chewy?
I can't eat something like that.

scenes.npcDialog: Thank you for coming. Shall we get started?

choices.text: Thank you for having us. Yes, let's begin.
It's a pleasure to be here. Please, go ahead.

scenes.npcDialog: Would you like a receipt?

choices.text: Yes, and can I get a proper invoice for my company?
I need an invoice with VAT details.

scenes.npcDialog: What can I get started for you?

choices.text: A latte and a slice of apple pie, please.
What pastries do you have today?
Why is coffee so expensive here?

scenes.npcDialog: Do you need help with the ATM?

choices.text: Can I use my foreign card here?
Is there a fee for international cards?

scenes.npcDialog: Bateaux-Mouches departing in 10 minutes! The sunset cruise is the most romantic. Great view of all the bridges!
scenes.npcDialogKo: 바토무슈 10분 후 출발해요! 일몰 크루즈가 가장 로맨틱해요. 모든 다리가 잘 보여요!

choices.text: Perfect timing! Is there commentary in English?
The sunset cruise sounds amazing! How long is it?
I'd rather walk along the river.

scenes.npcDialog: From here you can see all of Paris! On a clear day, you can see 50 kilometers. The basilica is free to enter.
scenes.npcDialogKo: 여기서 파리 전체가 보여요! 맑은 날엔 50킬로미터까지 보여요. 성당 입장은 무료예요.

choices.text: What an incredible view! This is the best panorama of Paris!
Free entry? That's wonderful. Is there a dress code?
There are too many tourists here.

scenes.npcDialog: The Eiffel Tower sparkles every hour on the hour at night! Best view from Trocadéro. Magic of Paris!
scenes.npcDialogKo: 에펠탑이 밤에 매시간 반짝거려요! 트로카데로에서 가장 잘 보여요. 파리의 마법이에요!

choices.text: It really sparkles? That's magical! What time does it start?
This is the perfect way to end my Paris trip!
Lights are a waste of electricity.
I've seen enough of the Eiffel Tower.

scenes.npcDialog: Here's my business card.

choices.text: Thank you. Here's mine as well.
I appreciate it. Let me give you mine.

scenes.npcDialog: I see you have a reservation for tonight.

choices.text: Yes, is early check-in possible? I have a meeting at 2.
I just landed. Can I get my room now?

scenes.npcDialog: Looking for something specific?

choices.text: Where can I find local snacks?
Do you have any lunch deals?

scenes.npcDialog: The city pass includes unlimited transport and museum entries. 60 euros for 3 days.
scenes.npcDialogKo: 시티패스에 무제한 교통과 박물관 입장이 포함되어 있어요. 3일에 60유로입니다.

choices.text: That sounds like a good deal. I'll take one.

scenes.npcDialog: Tonight's special: Coq au Vin - chicken braised in wine, and Boeuf Bourguignon. Classic French cuisine!
scenes.npcDialogKo: 오늘의 특선: 코코뱅 - 와인에 조린 닭고기, 그리고 부르기뇽. 클래식 프랑스 요리예요!

choices.text: I'll try the Coq au Vin! What wine pairs well with it?
Both sound delicious! Which one is more traditional?

scenes.npcDialog: French cheese! We have 400 varieties. Try Camembert, Brie, Roquefort. Some are very strong!
scenes.npcDialogKo: 프랑스 치즈예요! 400종류가 있어요. 카망베르, 브리, 로크포르 드셔보세요. 일부는 아주 강해요!

choices.text: 400 varieties! What do you recommend for a first-timer?
I'd like to try Camembert. How do French people eat it?

scenes.npcDialog: Your client has arrived. Shall I bring the menus?

choices.text: Yes, please. And a bottle of wine for the table.
Thank you. We'll order in a few minutes.
I'm not paying for this meal.

scenes.npcDialog: Check-out is normally at 11 AM.

choices.text: Is late checkout possible? My flight is at 8 PM.
Could I extend until 3 PM? I have meetings until noon.

scenes.npcDialog: How can I help you with tickets?

choices.text: I'd like a day pass, please.
How much is an unlimited daily ticket?
Tickets are a waste of money.

scenes.npcDialog: Would you like to rent a bike? It's 10 euros for the day.

choices.text: Yes, please! Is a helmet included?
Do you have a city bike map?
I don't know how to ride.

scenes.npcDialog: Would you like to toast to the partnership?
Welcome to the business lounge. How long until your flight?
scenes.npcDialogKo: 비즈니스 라운지에 오신 것을 환영합니다. 비행기까지 얼마나 남았어요?

choices.text: About 2 hours. Is there a quiet area to work?
I have some time. Where can I take a call privately?

scenes.npcDialog: Need help with the tram system?

choices.text: Which line goes to the museum district?
Where do I validate my ticket?

scenes.npcDialog: Front desk, how may I help you?

choices.text: The air conditioning in my room isn't working.
I can't figure out how to adjust the temperature.

scenes.npcDialog: Housekeeping, can I help you?

choices.text: Could I get some extra towels, please?
I need more towels for my room.

scenes.npcDialog: Good morning! How can I assist you today?

choices.text: Could I get a late checkout?

scenes.npcDialog: Are you checking out today?

choices.text: Yes, I'd like to check out.

scenes.npcDialog: Would you like us to store your luggage?

choices.text: Yes, I'll pick it up around 3 PM.
That would be great. My flight is this evening.

scenes.npcDialog: Good evening! Table for how many?
Are you ready to order?

choices.text: Yes, I'll have the pasta, please.
Could I have a few more minutes?

scenes.npcDialog: What would you like to drink?

choices.text: I'll have a glass of water, please.
Could I see the wine list?

scenes.npcDialog: Do you have any food allergies?
Can I get you anything else?
How would you like to pay?

choices.text: Can I pay with credit card?

scenes.npcDialog: Where to?

choices.text: Can you take me to this address?

scenes.npcDialog: That'll be 25 euros.

choices.text: Here you go. Keep the change.

scenes.npcDialog: How can I help you?

choices.text: One ticket to Central Station, please.
How much is a day pass?
I want to ride for free.

scenes.npcDialog: Can I help you with directions?

choices.text: Does this bus go to the museum?
Which bus goes to the city center?

scenes.npcDialog: Excuse me, are you lost?

choices.text: Yes, I'm looking for the train station.
Could you tell me how to get to the museum?

scenes.npcDialog: Good morning! Where are you flying to today?

choices.text: I don't want to go home.

scenes.npcDialog: Last minute shopping? Can I help you find something?
scenes.npcDialogKo: 마지막 쇼핑하세요? 뭔가 찾는 거 도와드릴까요?

choices.text: I'm looking for some chocolate as a gift.
Do you have any local souvenirs?

scenes.npcDialog: Do you need a customs declaration form?

choices.text: Yes, please. What do I need to declare?
Do I need to declare gifts I bought?
